message:
chore: bump version to 0.4.0 for release

Wide-ranging changes since 0.3.7 (~370 commits) — large refactor passes,
search/index hardening, doctor + state cleanups. Highlights:
- fix(search): chunk SQLite FTS fallback hydration
- fix(introspect): recurse runtime schema validation
- fix(state): always report counts_skipped=true on skip_db_open path
- fix(health): assert large-latency fixture row counts; guard skip_db_open
- multiple simplification/derive passes (skill-loop) reducing duplication

Plus pre-release polish:
- Replace debug_assert! with const block over const inputs (clippy::assertions_on_constants)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.3.7"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
